prompt: Implement local executor for capability-evolver (replacing feishu-evolver-wrapper). Context: Evolver runs but sessions_spawn calls fail because no executor exists. Goal: (1) Create simple local executor at ~/.agents/skills/capability-evolver/skills/local-executor/ that can receive sessions_spawn JSON and execute skill creation, (2) Make Evolver's bridge mode work with local executor instead of feishu, (3) Test by running Evolver once and verify it can actually create/modify files. Deliverables: (1) Working local-executor skill, (2) Modified Evolver config to use local executor, (3) /Users/ZenoWang/.openclaw/workspace/evolver-local-executor-report.md with implementation details and test evidence. Constraint: Keep it simple, avoid external dependencies, must work on this Mac.
